entry.title: Electrical Connection between flexible probe and PCB/ASIC by Inkjet Printing

link.title: Electrical Connection between flexible probe and PCB/ASIC by Inkjet Printing

entry.summary: Improve techniques by inkjet printing for electric connection between flexible probes and ASIC/PCB for neural probes fabrication process. Instructor: Prof. Euisik Yoon from University of Michigan Duration: 05/2022-08/2022 Introduction Neural probes play an important roles in medical and clinical application. With the help of neural probe, neuroscientists are able to know more about di...

Senturia Duration: 07/2022-present Chapter 1 Introduction What's in a name?...A rose by any other name would smell as sweet. -- W. entry.title: Abdominal Medical Images Segmentation with CNN-Transformer Hybrid Model

link.title: Abdominal Medical Images Segmentation with CNN-Transformer Hybrid Model

entry.summary: Two novel neural network is purposed to solve problems in abodominal multi-organs segmentation: fragmental objects and failure in detecting small, direction-depend obejcts. entry.title: MicroBeetles:Thermally-Actuated 1-DOF Translational Nano-stage with Closed-loop Positioning

link.title: MicroBeetles:Thermally-Actuated 1-DOF Translational Nano-stage with Closed-loop Positioning

entry.summary: Thermally-actuated 1 degree of freedom translational Nano-stage was designed, fabricated and tested. The driving and sensing circuit for the stage are also designed customizedly.
